candidate: Full-vocab MTP draft LM-head after cap65536 retained row
decision: no-hold; keep cap65536 as the default operating point

workload.suite: llama.cpp mtp-bench prompt suite, raw prompt render

commands.full_vocab_quicksort_smoke: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=0 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-vocabfull-current-quicksort-smoke-20260612.json
commands.full_vocab_suite: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=0 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-vocabfull-current-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-vocabfull-current-9prompt-d32.json
commands.cap65536_control_suite: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=65536 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-vocab65536-current-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-vocab65536-current-9prompt-d32.json

decision_reason: Full vocab recovered a small amount of acceptance versus cap65536 (+0.099 visible tokens/cycle), but the larger draft LM-head made proposal/update nearly 1.0 ms/cycle slower and total wall nearly 3.0 ms/cycle slower. The exact 9-prompt D32 ratio regressed from 0.967x to 0.880x. Keep cap65536 and make it the no-env default; use HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=0 only as an explicit diagnostic.
